starving.name: Starving
starving.description: Severe hunger weakens the character and reduces effectiveness.

dehydrated.name: Dehydrated
dehydrated.description: Lack of water causes weakness and slower recovery.

exhausted.name: Exhausted
exhausted.description: Lack of sleep reduces concentration and performance.

addiction.name: Addiction
addiction.description: Character suffers penalties without substance use.

chemEffect.name: Chem Effect
chemEffect.description: Temporary bonuses or penalties from substances.

wellFed.name: Well Fed
wellFed.description: Provides bonuses from proper nutrition and hydration.

exposure.name: Exposure
exposure.description: Causes fatigue due to environmental conditions.

unconscious.name: Unconscious
unconscious.description: Unable to act until stabilized or healed.

dying.name: Dying
dying.description: Requires immediate stabilization to avoid death.

invisible.name: Invisible
invisible.description: Harder to detect and increases defense.

blind.name: Blind
blind.description: Cannot see, affecting accuracy and perception.

fear.name: Fear
fear.description: Attempts to flee or loses control under stress.

resistance.name: Resistance
resistance.description: Reduces damage of a specific type.

menuScreen.subtitle: FALLOUT 2D20 CHARACTER MANAGER
menuScreen.name: Name
menuScreen.noSavedCharacter: No saved character found in local storage.

head.crippled: Lose next normal actions. Vision tests are +2 difficulty.
head.treated: Head stabilized. Vision and focus may still be impaired.

torso.crippled: Heavy bleeding. Take ongoing damage each turn.
torso.treated: Bleeding controlled, but the wound is still serious.

leftArm.crippled: Drop held item. That arm cannot be used.
leftArm.treated: Arm stabilized, but use remains limited.

rightArm.crippled: Drop held item. That arm cannot be used.
rightArm.treated: Arm stabilized, but use remains limited.

leftLeg.crippled: Fall prone. No sprint. Moving is slower.
leftLeg.treated: Leg stabilized, but mobility is still reduced.

rightLeg.crippled: Fall prone. No sprint. Moving is slower.
rightLeg.treated: Leg stabilized, but mobility is still reduced.

unsavedChanges.title: UNSAVED CHANGES
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Export the current record before leaving this screen.

persistent.name: Persistent
persistent.description: If effects are rolled, the target takes the weapon’s damage again at the end of future turns for several rounds. They can use an action to try to stop it early.

piercing1.name: Piercing 1
piercing1.description: Each effect ignores part of the target’s DR. The ignored amount depends on the weapon’s Piercing rating.

piercing2.name: Piercing 2
piercing2.description: Each effect ignores part of the target’s DR. The ignored amount depends on the weapon’s Piercing rating.

piercing3.name: Piercing 3
piercing3.description: Each effect ignores part of the target’s DR. The ignored amount depends on the weapon’s Piercing rating.

piercing4.name: Piercing 4
piercing4.description: Each effect ignores part of the target’s DR. The ignored amount depends on the weapon’s Piercing rating.

radioactive.name: Radioactive
radioactive.description: Each effect also adds extra radiation damage, resolved separately after the main hit.

spread.name: Spread
spread.description: Each effect creates an extra hit on the same target. Extra hits deal half damage and strike random locations.

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: If at least one effect is rolled, the target loses their normal actions on their next turn.

vicious.name: Vicious
vicious.description: Each effect increases the total damage dealt.

burst.name: Burst
burst.description: Each effect can hit another target near the main one, spending additional ammunition.

breaking.name: Breaking
breaking.description: Each effect weakens cover or, if there is no cover, reduces DR on the struck location for the weapon’s damage type.

accurate.name: Accurate
accurate.description: Works best when aimed carefully. You can spend AP after aiming to add extra damage dice.

blast.name: Blast
blast.description: Targets a whole zone instead of one enemy. On failure, it still deals reduced area damage.

closeQuarters.name: Close Quarters
closeQuarters.description: Does not suffer extra difficulty when used within reach of an enemy.

concealed.name: Concealed
concealed.description: Easy to hide unless openly carried or found during a proper search.

debilitating.name: Debilitating
debilitating.description: Injuries caused by this weapon are harder to treat.

gatling.name: Gatling
gatling.description: Consumes ammo in large bursts and gains stronger bonus damage when extra ammo is spent.

mine.name: Mine
mine.description: Can be placed and primed to damage creatures that move close to it.

parry.name: Parry
parry.description: Can improve your Defense against incoming melee attacks by spending AP.

recon.name: Recon
recon.description: After aiming, the next ally attacking that target gains a re-roll benefit.

reliable.name: Reliable
reliable.description: Ignores the first complication rolled with that weapon in each combat encounter.

suppressed.name: Suppressed
suppressed.description: Harder for enemies to notice when fired from stealth.

thrown.name: Thrown
thrown.description: Can be used as a ranged attack with a listed throwing range.

twoHanded.name: Two-Handed
twoHanded.description: Needs both hands for normal use. One-handed attacks are much harder.

unreliable.name: Unreliable
unreliable.description: Raises the chance of complications when used.

mapPanel.title: MAP
mapPanel.campRest: You set up camp to rest +8h

hazardsDesc.danger: Deals periodic physical damage from hidden fire or hazards.

commonwealth.ammo_crate: Loot: You find an ammo crate. Gain 5 random rounds.
commonwealth.nuka_fridge: Loot: An old Nuka-Cola fridge. There might be something useful inside.
commonwealth.metro_station: Metro station. It might be worth exploring.
commonwealth.cave: A dark and eerie cave. It might be worth exploring.
commonwealth.west_tek_building: A West-Tek facility. Dangerous, but potentially valuable.
commonwealth.bus_station: A bus station. There could be supplies or survivors here.
commonwealth.mine: An abandoned mine. It's dark and silent inside.
commonwealth.super_duper_mart: Super Duper Mart. Might be worth checking the shelves and storage.
commonwealth.raider_outpost: A raider outpost. Someone is definitely here.
commonwealth.mutant_outpost: A super mutant outpost. Stay alert.
commonwealth.bos_outpost: Brotherhood of Steel outpost. Their reaction depends on your reputation.
commonwealth.ncr_outpost: NCR outpost. Could be trade... or interrogation.
commonwealth.settlement: A small settlement. You may find rest, rumors, or trade opportunities.
commonwealth.ambush: Ambush! You are attacked. Enemies strike first.
commonwealth.rad_waste_pit: You fall into a pit of radioactive waste. Take radiation damage.
commonwealth.lost_supplies: You lost some supplies during travel.
commonwealth.broken_backpack: Your backpack is torn. Some of your gear is lost.
commonwealth.fatal_breakdown: Critical failure. Your equipped weapon or armor breaks and becomes unusable.
commonwealth.food_poisoning: You ate something bad and got poisoned.
commonwealth.hunger_crash: Your hunger drops to 0. You also gain 1 level of exhaustion.
commonwealth.toxic_puddle: Toxic puddle. You are exposed to poison or lose leg protection.
commonwealth.pickpocket: Pickpocket. One unequipped item is stolen from your inventory.
commonwealth.building_collapse: A collapsing building falls on you. Take physical damage.
commonwealth.grenade_tripwire: Grenade tripwire! You and adjacent allies take physical damage.
commonwealth.stuck_in_textures: You got stuck in the terrain. You cannot move until you take a long rest.
commonwealth.overload: Over-encumbered. Drop items or gain 1 level of exhaustion.

weird.mr_gutsy_drill: A group of Mister Gutsy robots mistakes you for training participants.
weird.cult_preachers: A strange cult tries to recruit you.
weird.wasteland_convention: Fans of pre-war culture are organizing a bizarre wasteland convention.
weird.super_mutant_tech: Super mutants are attempting to operate advanced pre-war technology.
weird.rickshaw_taxi: A makeshift taxi offers you a ride for caps.
weird.vault_wanderer: A vault dweller asks for help repairing their vault systems.
